snippet.title: LIVE | [BM] MPL MY Season 17 Grand Finals
snippet.description:
Pentas Grand Finals MPL MY Season 17 hari ini bakal menjadi saksi pertembungan dua ideologi terbesar MLBB tanah air. SRG lawan VMS! 🏆🔥

Adakah takhta ini akan kekal dikawal oleh sang dinasti demi melengkapkan legasi 5-peat, atau generasi baharu bakal bangkit untuk melahirkan juara yang baharu? Satu piala, dua takdir, dan hanya satu pasukan akan bergelar pencipta sejarah!

Ahad | 7 Jun 2026 
SRG vs VMS - 5:30 PM

📌 MPL MY S17 Playoffs Venue: Stadium Juara
🎪 Aktiviti Booth: 3 - 7 Jun 2026
🎙️ Aktiviti Pentas: 5 - 7 Jun 2026
🎟️ Pautan di bio

#MYtimeMYera #MPLMYS17 #MLBB

snippet.title: 🔴 LIVE | MPL ID S17 | Playoffs Hari 2 | Bahasa Indonesia
snippet.description:
Selamat datang di Hari Kedua Playoffs MPL ID Season 17! 🔥

Persaingan menuju gelar juara semakin memanas dan tidak ada lagi pertandingan yang mudah. Setiap game, setiap objektif, dan setiap keputusan bisa menentukan nasib sebuah tim di Playoffs MPL ID S17.

Pertandingan pertama akan mempertemukan Team Liquid ID dan GEEK Fam. Setelah berhasil bertahan di hari sebelumnya, GEEK harus kembali menghadapi tantangan berat melawan TLID yang datang dengan ambisi besar untuk melangkah lebih jauh di babak Playoffs. Siapakah yang mampu menjaga asa mereka menuju Velodrome?

Di pertandingan kedua, sang pemuncak klasemen Regular Season, ONIC, akan memulai perjalanan mereka di Playoffs dengan menghadapi Bigetron Esports. ONIC datang sebagai tim yang paling konsisten sepanjang musim, sementara BTR harus berjuang melewati tekanan demi menjaga mimpi mereka meraih gelar MPL ID S17.

Dengan tiket menuju babak berikutnya yang dipertaruhkan, setiap tim akan memberikan segalanya di Land of Dawn. Saksikan pertarungan sengit para tim terbaik Indonesia dalam perebutan tahta MPL ID S17!
Infinix GT 50 Pro Resmi Hadir! ⚡
Dapatkan harga spesial First Sale sekarang juga di:
https://linktr.ee/InfinixIndo

snippet.title: Heart of the Beast | Official Trailer (2026 Movie) - Brad Pitt, J.K. Simmons, Anna Lambe
snippet.description:
It’s not who you live for… It’s who you’d die for. Watch Brad Pitt in the new trailer for David Ayer’s #HeartOfTheBeast - only in theatres September 25th. 

After a harrowing plane crash, Special Forces officer James Belmont (Brad Pitt) and his combat dog, Odin, find themselves stranded deep in the Alaskan wilderness. Together, they are forced into a brutal fight for survival against the elements. From acclaimed filmmaker David Ayer, Heart of the Beast is an intense adventure thriller that explores the unbreakable bond between a man and his best friend as they face their greatest battle yet.

snippet.title: Whalefall | Official Teaser | In Theaters October 16
snippet.description:
The odds of being swallowed alive by a whale are not zero.

Watch the new teaser for #Whalefall and see the film only in theaters October 16.

Following the death of his father (Josh Brolin), Jay Gardiner (Austin Abrams) goes diving off the central Coast of California in search of his remains, but is swallowed by a massive sperm whale. While trapped inside its belly with only one hour of oxygen left, Jay comes to realize that the hard-earned lessons his father imparted may be the key to his escape.

you took me back in time to when i was unbroken
now you're all i want

and i want you to sing it again

like it was a private show

will you be there to sing it again?
could i be the one you talk about in all your stories?
can i be him?

can i be him

snippet.title: Gatto | Teaser Trailer | In Theaters March 5, 2027
snippet.description:
Ciao Gatto
Watch the new teaser for Disney & Pixar's #Gatto, arriving in theaters March 5, 2027

Mark Ruffalo (“Poor Things,” “The Avengers,” “Spotlight, “Foxcatcher”) has joined the voice cast as the scrappy black cat Nero, and Laurence Fishburne (“The Matrix” trilogy, “Boyz n the Hood,” “What's Love Got to Do with It”) will voice the ruthless mob boss cat Rocco. The teaser trailer introduces Nero and Rocco as they question another cat in a funny interrogation scene.
In “Gatto,” after years of maneuvering the canal-ridden, superstitious city of Venice, Italy, Nero begins to question whether he’s lived the right lives. Indebted to Rocco, the local feline mob boss, Nero finds himself in a quandary and is forced to forge a truly unexpected friendship that may finally lead him to his purpose—unless Venice gets the better of him first.
“Gatto” is directed by Enrico Casarosa and produced by Andrea Warren, the filmmaking team behind the Oscar®-nominated feature “Luca.” The new film releases exclusively in theaters March 5, 2027.

ABOUT PIXAR ANIMATION STUDIOS
Pixar Animation Studios, a wholly owned subsidiary of The Walt Disney Company, is an Academy Award®-winning film studio with world-renowned technical, creative and production capabilities in the art of computer animation. The Northern California studio has created some of the most successful and beloved animated films of all time, including “Toy Story,” “Monsters, Inc.,” “Cars,” “The Incredibles,” “Ratatouille,” “WALL•E,” “Up,” “Brave,” “Inside Out,” “Coco,” “Soul,” “Turning Red,” “Elemental,” and “Inside Out 2.”

snippet.title: MPL TALK  MALAYSIA S17 GRANDFINALS : GOAT OF MPLMY
snippet.description:
Selepas sembilan minggu penuh dengan aksi, kejutan, perdebatan, dan pelbagai cerita menarik, tirai MPL MY Season 17 akhirnya melabuhkan tirainya.

Selangor Red Giants sekali lagi membuktikan dominasi mereka apabila berjaya mempertahankan kejuaraan dan mencipta fivepeat, selepas menewaskan Vamos dengan keputusan 4-0 di pentas Grand Final. Walaupun tewas di perlawanan akhir, Vamos tetap berjaya mengesahkan slot mereka ke Esports World Cup (EWC) Paris, sekaligus melengkapkan musim yang cukup cemerlang buat pasukan tersebut.

Dalam saingan Lower Bracket Final pula, Invictus Gaming terpaksa akur apabila tewas kepada Vamos, sekali gus menamatkan perjalanan mereka dalam musim yang penuh dengan prestasi memberangsangkan sebagai antara pasukan paling konsisten musim ini.

Minggu terakhir ini juga menyaksikan perjalanan beberapa pasukan playoff seperti BTRM, Team Rey, RRQ, Invictus Gaming, Vamos, dan Selangor Red Giants, yang telah memberikan aksi terbaik mereka sepanjang musim.

Dalam episod terakhir MPL Talk MY Season 17, sertai Abang Lord, Nevinne, Coach Rain, Mars, dan Sunfrost untuk mengimbau kembali detik-detik terbaik musim ini, membincangkan perjalanan setiap pasukan, serta menilai segala yang telah berlaku sepanjang MPL MY Season 17.

Terima kasih kepada semua yang sentiasa menyokong MPL Talk MY sepanjang musim ini.

snippet.title: Penat Tapi Kena Kuat - Duka Malam (Official Lyric Video) | Lagu Melayu Sedih 2026
snippet.description:
Penat tapi kena kuat bukan bermaksud kita kena tanggung semua sorang-sorang. Bila rasa terlalu letih sampai tak tahu nak bergantung pada siapa, ingatlah masih ada tuhan yang sentiasa bersama, walaupun kita sendiri tak mampu.

Kadang kita rasa lemah, rasa hampir jatuh, tapi sebenarnya dalam setiap ujian tu tuhan tak pernah tinggalkan kita. Dia bagi kita kekuatan yang kita sendiri tak sedar kita ada, sampai kita boleh terus bertahan walaupun rasa dah tak mampu.

Walau penat macam mana sekalipun, jangan putus harapan dan putus asa. Sebab bila kita hampir rebah, di situ tuhan sedang pegang kita. Dan setiap rasa sakit yang kita lalui, semuanya tak pernah sia-sia di sisi-Nya.

Teruskan walau perlahan, sebab selagi kita masih bergantung pada tuhan, kita tak pernah benar-benar sendiri.
